title: Virtual CFO Services Bangalore | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Virtual CFO services in Bangalore for startups and SMEs. MIS, fundraising, compliance, financial planning. Expert CA. Call +91-95139 39333.
bodyText:
Looking for Virtual CFO services in Bangalore? Virtual Auditor provides strategic Virtual CFO services in Bangalore, led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, IBBI RV). Get dedicated CFO-level financial leadership tailored for Bangalore's startup and SME ecosystem.

What is Virtual CFO Services Bangalore | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Monthly MIS with P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, and custom KPI dashboards. Financial modelling for fundraising — DCF valuations, scenario analysis, unit economics tracking. Investor reporting — monthly/quarterly updates to existing investors with standardised metrics. Cash flow management — 13-week rolling forecasts, burn rate monitoring, runway analysis. Cap table management and ESOP administration. Compliance oversight — income tax planning, GST compliance, ROC filings, FEMA compliance for foreign-funded startups. Board meeting preparation — financial presentations, strategic recommendations, risk assessment.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor as Your Virtual CFO in Bangalore
  Bangalore startups need a CFO who understands venture financing, ESOP structuring, FEMA compliance for foreign investment, and regulatory requirements across multiple jurisdictions. CA V. Viswanathan brings this cross-functional expertise — FCA for financial strategy, ACS for corporate governance, and IBBI RV for valuations. Our MG Road office provides regular in-person engagement reviews. We serve companies from pre-seed through Series B and beyond, scaling our involvement as you grow. Our Virtual CFO clients have collectively raised over Rs 100 crores in funding.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Onboarding — assess current financial systems, accounting quality, compliance status. Step 2: Design custom MIS framework and KPI dashboard. Step 3: Implement monthly financial close process — MIS delivered by 10th of each month. Step 4: Quarterly reviews — budget vs actual analysis, cash flow forecasting, tax planning. Step 5: Fundraising support (when needed) — financial model, valuation, data room, investor coordination. Step 6: Year-end planning — annual budget, compliance calendar, statutory audit coordination.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need a Virtual CFO in Bangalore? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-95139 39333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001
  Flexible engagement models. Scale up as you grow.

faqs.q: How is Virtual CFO different from a CA firm doing accounts?
faqs.a: A CA firm typically handles compliance — filing returns, preparing financial statements. A Virtual CFO provides strategic financial management — fundraising, cash flow planning, investor reporting, financial modelling, and board advisory. We combine both under one engagement.

faqs.q: Do you work with venture-funded startups in Bangalore?
faqs.a: Yes. We serve multiple VC-funded startups in Bangalore. Our Virtual CFO service includes investor reporting, FEMA compliance for foreign investment rounds, ESOP administration, and due diligence support for subsequent funding rounds.

Standard engagement: monthly MIS delivery, fortnightly calls, quarterly in-person reviews. During fundraising or critical periods, interaction is typically weekly or as needed. Our MG Road office is available for walk-in meetings.
